allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: App Setup Portal

Web interface for capturing app team setup requirements including:
- User creation \(username, UID, groups, shell\)
- Mount point configuration
- NFS mount setup
- Environment variables
- Service start/stop commands

Features:
- Password-protected access
- Multi-app request tracking
- YAML/JSON export
- Status management \(pending/approved/completed/rejected\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash("C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create dashboard --public --source=. --push)
Bash("C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" api user/repos -f name=dashboard -f private=false -f description="App Setup Portal - Web interface for capturing app team setup requirements")
